stories.title: Cubs 10, Phillies 4 — Carson Kelly's 9th-Inning Dagger Evens the Series

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs 10, Phillies 4.

Carson Kelly's 3-run blast in the 9th put it out of reach. Colin Rea was unreal in long relief — gave up the early HR, then 6 innings of zeros.

Series tied 1-1. Rubber game tonight in Philly.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Carson Kelly Is THAT Guy — Clutch Three-Run Bomb in the 9th

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Carson Kelly is THAT guy.

3-run dagger off Tanner Banks in the 9th. The kind of swing that ends a game.

Quietly one of the best clutch catchers in the NL. Absolutely.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Colin Rea Wrote the Bullpen-Game Blueprint

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Colin Rea wrote the blueprint.

Came in cold in the 2nd. Surrendered a 3-run Sosa shot. Then absolutely locked it down for 6 innings of zeros.

With 3 starters on the IL, this is the formula until June. Bullpen games or bust.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: The Cubs IL Is Getting Absurd — 8 Pitchers Out

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Cubs IL is getting absurd.

Rotation: Boyd, Horton, Steele
Bullpen: Maton, Harvey, Hodge, Wicks, Roberts

Little and Rolison up from Iowa. Barnes optioned. Iowa is basically the real Cubs pitching staff right now.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Imanaga Gets the Ball Tonight — Bounce-Back Spot Against Philly

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Imanaga gets the ball tonight. 0-1 with a 2.81 ERA and 20 K through 2 starts.

The numbers say he's been better than the record. Tonight against a Phillies lineup that hung 13 on this team Monday — chance to flip the narrative.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Rubber Game Tonight in Philly — Imanaga vs Luzardo

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Cubs at Phillies tonight. 5:40 PM CT first pitch.

Imanaga vs Jesús Luzardo. Two of the best lefties in the NL.

Rubber game. Series on the line. The Cubs need this one.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Game Time — First Pitch Coming, Imanaga on the Hill

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Imanaga's been dealing in Philly. The Cubs have his back tonight.

Went toe-to-toe with this Phillies lineup yesterday and won 10-4. Tonight: rubber game, lefty vs lefty, real April baseball.

Let's go. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
